zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Dinham於大約1253年出生在英國英格蘭戴文哈特藍德時，她的父親Sir Oliver Dinham20歲，母親Isabel de Vere19歲。她和Roger Carminow至少有9個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1321年之後在英國英格蘭可瓦爾博德明，埋葬在英國可瓦爾博德明。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Dinham于大约1253年出生在英国英格兰戴文哈特藍德时，她的父亲Sir Oliver Dinham20岁，母亲Isabel de Vere19岁。她和Roger Carminow至少有9个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1321年之后在英国英格兰可瓦爾博德明，埋葬在英国可瓦爾博德明。

nameMeanings.name: Dinham

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Dinham was born about 1253, in Hartland, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Oliver Dinham, was 20 and her mother, Isabel de Vere, was 19. She had at least 9 sons and 4 daughters with Roger Carminow. She died after 1321, in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Bodmin, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Dinham est née environ 1253, à Hartland, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Oliver Dinham, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Vere, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles avec Roger Carminow. Elle est décédée après 1321, à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Dinham um 1253 in Hartland, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Oliver Dinham 20 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Vere 19. Sie hatte mit Roger Carminow mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1321 in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bodmin, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Dinham è nata il circa 1253 nel Hartland, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Oliver Dinham, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Vere, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie con Roger Carminow. Morì dopo il 1321, nel Bodmin, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Bodmin, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Dinhamが約1253年にイギリスイギリスデボンハートランドで生まれた時，父Sir Oliver Dinhamは20歳，母Isabel de Vereは19歳であった。彼女はRoger Carminowとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1321年以後にイギリスイギリスコルンワルボドミンで死去し，イギリスコルンワルボドミンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Dinham(이)가 대략 1253년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 하틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Oliver Dinham(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Vere(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Roger Carminow(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1321년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 보드민에서 사망했으며 영국 코른월 보드민에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Dinham nasceu aproximadamente 1253, em Hartland, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Oliver Dinham, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Vere, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas com Roger Carminow. Ela faleceu após 1321, em Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Dinham родилась около 1253 г. в местности хартланд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Oliver Dinham было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Vere, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери от Roger Carminow. Она умерла после 1321 г. в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Dinham nació aproximadamente 1253, en Hartland, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Oliver Dinham, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Isabel de Vere, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas con Roger Carminow. Murió después de 1321, en Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
